name: Turtle Cake # 2
recipeInstructions:
1. Prepare the cake mix according to the package directions.
2. Pour half of the batter into a buttered and floured 9x13-inch pan.
3. Set the remaining batter aside.
4. Bake at 350 degrees Fahrenheit for 18 minutes.
5. Melt the caramels and evaporated milk together in a saucepan over medium heat, stirring until smooth.
6. Stir in the chopped pecans to the caramel mixture.
7. Sprinkle chocolate chips evenly over the baked portion of the cake.
8. Pour the caramel and pecan mixture over the chocolate chips.
9. Pour the remaining batter over the top of the layers.
10. Continue baking at 350 degrees Fahrenheit for an additional 20 minutes.
11. Cut into squares to serve.
